source_meta.source_document: CORAIL Total Hip System and Hip Specialty Resources

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official CORAIL materials support a dedicated cementless hip stem instrumentation workflow applicable to the hemiarthroplasty construct.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official CORAIL materials describe the cementless tapered femoral stem family.
Bipolar femoral head component used with the CORAIL hemiarthroplasty construct.
Inner modular femoral head component compatible with the CORAIL taper within the bipolar construct.
